raw.subject: Rustic Scruff in Coal City
raw.body:
Hi, 
   
I saw your post about being awarded 'Best' in Pet Services in Grundy County for 2026, that's quite an achievement. 

But I noticed you don't have a website outside of Facebook, which might make it harder for new customers to find and book your services in Coal City.

On a whim, I pulled together a quick page concept from what you already post, including sections for your grooming services and a photo gallery. It also has a clear call to action for booking.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/rustic-scruff-coal-city/

No pressure, just thought I'd share. If you're interested in exploring a paid project like this further, feel free to reply or we could set up a quick call.
